titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the To Be A Man Motion Picture Film, Yale University
To Be A Man Motion Picture Film, Yale University
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday April 11, 2020 at 08:02
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.unittitle: To Be A Man motion picture film, Yale University
did.abstract: The materials consist of 16mm motion picture film and soundtracks used in the production of To Be A Man, a Yale admissions film.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 48-B (YRG 48-B), Yale audiovisual records and collections.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research. Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: To Be A Man Motion Picture Film, Yale University (RU 845). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of 16mm motion picture film and soundtracks used in the production of To Be A Man, a Yale admissions film.
The final product produced for distribution is catalogued individually.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by type of record.

did.unittitle: Films and sound used in the production of To Be A Man

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: There is no work-print or final cut of the film in its entirety in this accession. While the sequential numbering of the cans has been maintained, it is not apparent that this order corresponds to anything intelligible relating to the content of each can of film.

did.unittitle: Films, includes scenes and trims used in production. [Each can holds many spools of film]
"To Be A Man" motion picture film transcripts
Change as a result of new insight-professor
Change as a result of new insight-student
What do we want the film to show
What have I gotten out of Yale
What do I hope to get from college
What is the true meaning of education-professor
What is the true meaning of education-student
Why and how Yale is changing now
